backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Mitsubishi dealership backend, defining all data stores (vehicles, variants, colors, blog posts, promotions, testimonials, media, visitor stats, etc.), their ID counters, and shared types, while mixing in storage and authorization modules.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that ensures at least one super_admin exists in the admin store by promoting the first admin record if none is found during canister upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file at the frontend root level.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang frontend app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and protects admin routes with AuthGuard.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating or editing admin users, validating Principal ID format and submitting create/update mutations with role selection.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component that displays admin users with their principal ID, role badge, creation date, and edit/delete action buttons, disabling delete when only one admin remains.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component that lets admins pick a banner image (main or CTA) from existing media assets, displaying them in a radio-group grid and returning the selected asset ID.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form for creating or editing blog posts, with delegation identity token validation before submitting create/update mutations to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Displays a table of all blog posts with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, using confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Renders a grid of uploaded media assets with copy-ID and delete actions, generating blob URLs from canister-stored data and validating delegation identity before deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload zone supporting images and PDFs up to 10MB, with per-file progress tracking, validation, and delegation identity checks before uploading to the canister.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: A dialog form component for creating or editing a passenger vehicle, with fields for name, description, and base price, using create/update vehicle mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all passenger vehicles with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a promotion, with fields for title, description, start date, and end date, using create/update promotion mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all promotions with their period and active status, supporting edit, delete, and active status toggle actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: A dialog form for creating or editing a testimonial, with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1–5), using create/update testimonial mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating, with edit and delete action buttons delegated via props.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top 10 most visited pages, with loading skeleton and empty state handling. Converts bigint view counts and truncates long URLs for display.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days, converting bigint timestamps and counts for display. Includes loading skeleton and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks Internet Identity delegation validity, syncs or clears the auth token in localStorage, and redirects unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of 5 latest article links that navigate to individual blog post pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with Call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and a dropdown menu button for site navigation links.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Renders a set of toggle buttons for selecting a vehicle variant, notifying the parent component on selection change.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a full-width CTA banner image (fetched from website settings or falling back to a static asset) with an overlay containing a WhatsApp contact button.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer displaying logo, contact info, social media links, and live visitor stats (auto-refreshed every 15 seconds) fetched from a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Renders a page-specific hero banner with a title, icon, background color, and subtitle determined by the current pathname.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Fetches and displays up to 8 family vehicle catalog entries in a carousel using VehicleCard components, with a loading state.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles (Mobil Niaga) fetched from the vehicle catalog API, with a loading state fallback.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main hero banner image fetched from website settings/media assets, falling back to a static placeholder, with an overlay title for Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu links, and a mobile hamburger menu that closes on outside click.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Renders like and share buttons for a vehicle product, tracking counts via the useProductInteractions hook and optionally invoking the native Web Share API.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicles fetched from the catalog, with a loading state fallback.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: A search input section that redirects users to the mobil-keluarga page with a query parameter when they submit a search.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section showcasing three dealership selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section with two paragraphs describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an authorized dealer.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component allowing users to choose a vehicle variant and color, notifying the parent via a callback whenever the selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying a vehicle's placeholder image, name, formatted base price, and a link to its detail page derived from a slugified name.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian-language string constants for UI labels, validation messages, and success/error/confirmation messages used across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: React Query hook that fetches admin dashboard statistics from the backend actor; currently returns zeroed default values as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on admin users, wrapping backend actor calls for listing, creating, updating, and deleting admins with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on blog posts (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete, toggle publish status), all stubbed with unimplemented backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on commercial vehicle categories, all stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a contact form, currently stubbed with a console log and no backend call, plus backward-compatibility aliases.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all contact submissions and deleting a contact, both stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a credit simulation form, currently stubbed with a console log, plus backward-compatibility aliases.
Provides React Query hooks for fetching all credit simulations and deleting one, both stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity state, and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, uploading, and deleting media assets, with actual backend actor calls implemented for all three operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for getting and mutating product like/share counts, all stubbed since backend methods are missing, plus a combined convenience hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions (get all, create, update, delete, toggle active status), all stubbed with unimplemented backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching vehicle catalogs and a single vehicle-with-catalog record, both stubbed returning empty/null since backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a single React Query hook for fetching website settings, currently stubbed to return null.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials, but all mutation and query functions are stubbed with errors since the backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for vehicle CRUD operations including catalog retrieval and publish toggling, all stubbed as unimplemented backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics; getVisitorStats calls the real backend, while trend and page-view hooks are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now does nothing, as tracking has been moved to PublicLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings via the backend actor, with protected mutation requiring authentication.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile support, click-outside collapse, and a logout handler that clears the query cache and identity.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing page layout that wraps content with Navbar, Footer, and BottomCTABar, and handles visitor tracking on each route change via the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
Admin page for managing admin users, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via AdminUserList and AdminUserDialog components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog posts with add/edit functionality using BlogPostList and BlogPostDialog, invalidating the blogPosts query cache on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles (Mobil Niaga) that displays a notice directing users to the passenger vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page that fetches and displays all credit simulation submissions in a sortable table with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard page displaying summary stat cards (vehicles, blog posts, leads, media, visitors) fetched via useAdminStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists all incoming contact/lead submissions sorted by timestamp in a table with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin media manager page with an upload zone and a media asset grid, invalidating the mediaAssets cache after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit support via PassengerVehicleList and PassengerVehicleDialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality using PromoList and PromoDialog components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add, edit, and delete (with confirmation dialog) functionality using TestimonialList and TestimonialDialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin page displaying real-time visitor statistics (auto-refreshed every 15 seconds) with stat cards, a trend chart, and a top pages chart.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for managing website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images, with form state synced from fetched settings and identity validation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates admins via Internet Identity, syncs the auth token on success, and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple section components such as banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about us, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for a blog article detail view, displaying an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for the blog listing view, displaying an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for visitor inquiries (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, DP, tenor, message) that submits via the useContactForm hook with toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Detail page for a family vehicle, showing image, price, variant/color selector, action buttons, and tabs for specifications and features, resolved by slug from the vehicle catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page for family vehicles that fetches all vehicle catalogs and renders up to 8 vehicles as VehicleCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public listing page for commercial vehicles filtered by category slug, rendering up to 8 vehicles as VehicleCard components in a grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Detail page for a commercial vehicle, showing image, price, variant selector, action buttons, and tabs for specifications and features, resolved by slug from the vehicle catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Public page displaying three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to the respective category listing page.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page for promotions, displaying an 'under development' message with a prompt to contact sales.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Public page that renders a credit simulation form, allowing users to select a vehicle, enter down payment and tenor, and submit a credit simulation request with a live installment estimate.
Placeholder public page for testimonials that displays a 'under development' message.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines frontend-local TypeScript interfaces (Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleCatalog, AdminUser, CreditSimulation, etc.) that mirror backend types for use throughout the frontend.
frontend/src/utils/apiClient.ts: Provides a `protectedCall` wrapper for ICP canister calls that validates the user's authenticated principal, checks session activity, and handles authorization errors with appropriate session cleanup.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting canister-stored Uint8Array blob data into browser-displayable object URLs and checking MIME types for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Exports a single `calculateInstallment` function that computes monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor.
frontend/src/utils/tokenStorage.ts: Manages persistence of the authenticated ICP principal ID and session metadata in localStorage, including save, retrieve, expiry check, and clear operations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Collection of form validation helpers (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) plus a `validateDelegationIdentity` function that checks ICP delegation identity validity and expiration.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Provides utility functions for visitor tracking including session ID generation/persistence, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for a backend fix request on a Motoko-based admin management system, detailing three pending action items to correct super_admin bootstrap, recovery, and migration logic.
